languages.text: "Было бы странно предположить, что данное... существо отпустит нас, не выкинув ничего напоследок. Это — наименьшее из зол, которое оно могло бы причинить".
"It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."
languages.original_text: "Было бы странно предположить, что данное... существо отпустит нас, не выкинув ничего напоследок. Это — наименьшее из зол, которое оно могло бы причинить".

traits.locale_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."
"It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."
"It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

languages.text: 「あの…存在が最後の別れの一撃を放って、私たちを解放してくれるとは考えにくい。これは、その存在が私たちに与える被害の中でも、最も軽いものだ」
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: 「あの…存在が最後の別れの一撃を放って、私たちを解放してくれるとは考えにくい。これは、その存在が私たちに与える被害の中でも、最も軽いものだ。」

languages.text: «Hubiera sido extraño esperar que ese... ser nos dejara ir sin un último golpe de despedida. Esto es lo mínimo que podría haber hecho».
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: «Hubiera sido extraño esperar que ese... ser nos dejara ir sin un último golpe de despedida. Esto es lo mínimo que podría haber hecho».

languages.text: "Es wäre seltsam, anzunehmen, dass uns dieses ... Wesen, einfach so gehen lässt. Das ist der geringste Schaden, den es verursachen konnte."
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: "Es wäre seltsam, anzunehmen, dass uns dieses ... Wesen, einfach so gehen lässt. Das ist der geringste Schaden, den es verursachen konnte."

languages.text: « Il aurait été étonnant que cette... créature nous libère sans nous infliger un dernier affront. Mais elle aurait pu faire bien pire. »
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: « Il aurait été étonnant que cette... créature nous libère sans nous infliger un dernier affront. Mais elle aurait pu faire bien pire. »

languages.text: “若是认为那个存在会就此放过我们，不给我们最后一击，未免也太过天真。这已经算是它最仁慈的伤害了。”
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: “若是认为那个存在会就此放过我们，不给我们最后一击，未免也太过天真。这已经算是它最仁慈的伤害了。”

languages.text: "O... Varlığın son bir veda darbesi indirmeden bizi bırakacağını düşünmek garip olur. Bu, verebileceği zararların en hafifi."
languages.original_text: "It would be strange to suppose that that... being would release us without a final parting blow. This is the least of the harms it could have inflicted."

traits.locale_text: "O... Varlığın son bir veda darbesi indirmeden bizi bırakacağını düşünmek garip olur. Bu, verebileceği zararların en hafifi."
